layout.layout_rhythm: raw-grid: high density, medium-low formality. Neo-brutalist deck with thick borders, offset shadows, and a pink/sage/ink palette.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"pad_lg": "clamp(32px, 4vw, 64px)", "pad_md": "clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 40px)", "pad_sm": "clamp(12px, 1.5vw, 20px)", "gap_lg": "clamp(24px, 3vw, 48px)", "gap_md": "clamp(16px, 2vw, 32px)", "gap_sm": "clamp(8px, 1vw, 16px)"}

template_json_typography.style: system sans set in heavy weights with strong uppercase tracking; functional rather than expressive

design_tokens_typography.style: system sans set in heavy weights with strong uppercase tracking; functional rather than expressive

typography.typography_role: system sans set in heavy weights with strong uppercase tracking; functional rather than expressive

cjk_policy.known_degradation: Raw Grid's whole aesthetic argument is "this is the user's actual system font, not a downloaded display face." Loading Noto Sans SC technically violates that purity — but there is no acceptable substitute. macOS ships PingFang SC and Windows ships Microsoft YaHei, but the two render at noticeably different weights at "900," and the digital-native aesthetic d

template_json_palette.description: white background with ink-black structure, soft pink and sage green as flat color blocks, hard 3px borders and 6px offset shadows

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.
Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: accent_rule.
Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: soft_shadow.

Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: bold_border.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Segoe UI 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 system-ui 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 Segoe UI 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 Segoe UI 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。
font_strategy.same_role_font_justification: 源模板本身以单一 sans/system family 承担多数字体角色；通过 weight/size/line-height/uppercase 区分 display/body/label/metric。

italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

text_decoration_policy.underline.color.raw_value: 600) — the weight ladder is fixed. Italic is not used anywhere in the system. Underline is not used. The only emphasis mechanism is weight contrast. ## Layout ### Canvas System The system targets `100vw × 100vh` — full viewport. Each `.slide` is absolutely positioned to fill the viewport and onl

italic.raw_value: t 900 (the heaviest), titles use 800, subtitles use 700, body uses 500, with no italic variants and no alternate faces. The contrast between weight 900 uppercase and weight 500 sentence case is the system's primary typographic rhythm. ### Display and Numerical Scale | Token | Size (clamp) | Weight
